name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.26: deal/combo product picker now surfaces planogram products as search candidates (planogram is authoritative for goodsId/stock/image), so an orphaned catalog record collapses into the real in-stock entry and deals store the goodsId the kiosk matches. Includes v5.25 /sales diagnostic echo.
